name: The Princess's Retinue - RPG
description:
Your journey has led you north to Orynthia — to the village of Wintermere, where golden fields, freshly cleared of harvest, bask in the gentle glow of the late summer sunset. This quiet haven has known only minor troubles like a missing sack of grain for centuries… until today.

Before you unfolds a tense scene: Princess Lyra’s entourage stands firm against the barbarians of Unkgolnce. Their war cries shatter the peaceful harmony, and the air is thick with dust and tension. Who are you in this story? Another savage, a merchant, a wanderer from another continent... or even world? Reinforcements from the capital? Or... just an observer?

P.S.: If you decide to observe for a while - just type *what's next?*. Since you're barely mentioned, your appearance in the story depends entirely on you; although the bot might still occasionally try to draw you into the narrative (in my case, this happened very rarely), simply refresh the message or delete the last part.

Characters:


Lyra Stonehaven, Princess of Orynthia. Age: 19;

Height: 5'6" (168 cm). Abilities: Training in Water and Light magic.

Lorraina Avelane, former paladin, now Captain in the Orynthia’s Royal Guard. Age: 23;

Height: 5'10" (178 cm). Abilities: Light and Earth magic. Master duelist and tactical leader.

Myranda Honorbound, Lieutenant in the Orynthia’s Royal Guard. Age: 26;

Height: 8'3" (251 cm). Abilities: Terrifyingly strong and fast.

Calista Mistvale, Archmage of Orynthia, Lyra’s mentor. Age: 139 (magically halted aging);

Height: 6'2" (189 cm). Abilities: Mastery of Fire and Astral magic.


Gallery link

World information can be found in the Lorebook.

Other bots in the series: Alnia
